title: astragalus kelleri
intro: Astragalus kelleri, also known as the Keller's milkvetch, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to enhance the immune system and improve circulation. The health benefits of Astragalus kelleri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting energy levels. Astragalus kelleri is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and syrups.
